features.featureTitle: Update the Doctor Listing Screen (`frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx`) so that each doctor card displays all of the following fields: doctor photo (avatar/placeholder if no image), full name, qualification (e.g., MBBS, MD), specialty, years of experience, star rating (numeric value + star icons), starting consultation fee, available consultation modes (Online / Clinic / Home Visit) as small badge icons, and a prominent 'Book Now' button styled in the Medical Blue theme. The card layout must be clean, readable, and consistent across all viewport sizes. Reuse the shared mock doctor dataset from `frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts` as the single source of truth.

Add a sorting control above the doctor card list on the Doctor Listing Screen (`frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx`). The control must offer four sort options: 'Highest Rated', 'Lowest Fee', 'Most Experienced', and 'Available Today'. The active sort option must be visually highlighted using the Medical Blue theme. When a sort option is selected, the doctor card list must re-order in real time without a page reload. 'Available Today' must filter the list to only show doctors whose mock availability includes the current day of the week.
